# Privacy Notice

This app does not use cookies, analytics, advertising trackers, or any other 
third-party tracking code.

The app stores only the last selected 
[OGC API - Processes](https://docs.ogc.org/is/18-062r2/18-062r2.html) service 
and its configuration in your browser's 
[localStorage](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Web_Storage_API) 
so you do not have to enter it again on the next visit.

When you connect to an OGC API service, the app sends requests only to that 
provider. The app itself does not forward your data to our own servers.

If a result contains an external image, audio, video, or iframe URL, opening 
the preview loads that URL directly in your browser.

- Storage purpose: remember the last selected OGC API service provider.
- Storage location: your browser, via localStorage.
- Retention: until you clear your browser data or remove it manually.

---
You can clear this storage in your browser settings at any time.
